title: Initialise an RCF project on disk
description: A project owner starts a new RCF project and gets the canonical on-disk structure created for them, ready to receive documents.
asA: project owner starting a new RCF project
iWant: to run a single initialise command that creates the rcf folder, the manifest and the root document placeholders
soThat: I have a valid RCF project structure on disk without authoring any layout by hand

acceptanceCriteria.description: Initialise creates the rcf folder and a manifest declaring the three roots
acceptanceCriteria.then: an rcf folder exists containing a manifest that declares prd, tad and bs root references and validates against the manifest schema

acceptanceCriteria.description: Initialise refuses to overwrite an existing project
acceptanceCriteria.given: a directory that already contains an rcf manifest
acceptanceCriteria.when: the initialise command runs without an explicit force flag
acceptanceCriteria.then: the command exits non-zero, makes no changes and reports that a project already exists

acceptanceCriteria.description: Every document is discoverable by walking from the roots
acceptanceCriteria.given: an initialised project with a PRD, a TAD and a Build Sequence
acceptanceCriteria.then: all child documents are resolved by reading the parent id lists, with no child enumeration in the manifest
